## Recommended Next Courses
For Spring 2026, based on your Computer Science Major, B.S. requirements and courses in progress, here are some recommendations:

## Suggested Schedule (13 credits)
*   **MATH 235** — Calculus II (4 credits)
*   **CIS 201** — Business Processes and Information Systems (3 credits)
*   **CIS 276** — Introduction to Enterprise Web Development (3 credits)
*   **ECE 447** — Embedded Systems Design (3 credits)

## Notes
Please verify course availability for Spring 2026, as term data was not provided. You should also consult with your academic advisor to ensure these courses align with your specific degree plan and any remaining Core 39 requirements not covered by the provided course list.
